keyPoints: A UDF is a function that can be used in Hive queries to perform custom calculations or data transformations.
UDFs are stored in the Hive warehouse and can be used to extend the functionality of Hive.
UDFs can be written in any language that has a Java Native Interface (JNI) and can be used with Hive.
There are three types of UDFs: Java UDFs, Scala UDFs, and Python UDFs.
UDFs can be used to perform various tasks such as date and time manipulation, string manipulation, and mathematical calculations.
